titles.title: Price Stability Act of 2026
Price Stability Act of 2025
Price Stability Act of 2026
To amend the Federal Reserve Act to remove the mandate on the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System and the Federal Open Market Committee to focus on maximum employment.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 30 - 21.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Financial Services. H. Rept. 119-710.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 616.

committee.name: House Financial Services
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
